heroDescription: Specializing in IBE® Hand-Tied Extensions and custom color for seamless, natural results that elevate your everyday.
aboutBio: I believe luxury hair should feel effortless. With years of experience in extensions and lived-in color, I create looks that are seamless, intentional, and uniquely yours — because you deserve to feel confident every single day.

services.title: IBE® Hand-Tied Extensions
services.description: Seamless, natural-looking extensions for volume, length, and confidence.

services.title: Lived-In Color
services.description: Soft, dimensional color designed to grow out beautifully and effortlessly.

services.title: Luxury Experience
services.description: Private studio. Premium results. One-on-one attention every visit.

services.title: Custom Blending & Styling
services.description: Thoughtful extension placement with precise, personalized results.

testimonials.quote: I've never felt more confident in my hair. Tamika listened to exactly what I wanted and delivered beyond my expectations.
My install was seamless and so natural. Everyone asks where I get my hair done — I always send them to Suite 24.
The attention to detail was unmatched. From consultation to final style, everything felt intentional and luxurious.

bookCtaDescription: Appointments fill fast. Book your consultation today.
